tapTargets.label: Tap target is too small for a finger
tapTargets.tip: Give small links and buttons more room: increase padding or set a min-height/min-width (24px is the minimum, 44px is comfortable for mobile).

smallText.label: Body text is too small to read on mobile
smallText.tip: Use at least ~16px for body copy on mobile and avoid tiny fixed font sizes; use relative units so text scales.

failedResources.label: A CSS, script, font, or image file failed to load
failedResources.tip: Open the URL in the message: fix the path, restore the missing file, or remove the reference if it is no longer needed. Watch for hard-coded http:// URLs, references to a deleted plugin/theme asset, or a staging-only path.

consoleErrors.label: JavaScript errors in the browser console
consoleErrors.tip: Open the browser dev-tools console on the affected page, reproduce the error, and trace it to the responsible theme or plugin script. Update or replace the offending code.
